---
subcategory : "Cloud Project"
---

# ovh_cloud_instance_flavors

Retrieves the available instance flavors in a public cloud project (APIv2).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_instance_flavors" "b2" {
  service_name = "YYYY"
  region_name  = "GRA7"
  name         = "b2-.*"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `service_name` (String) Service name
- `region_name` (String) Region name

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter flavors by name (regexp match, e.g. `b2-.*`)

### Read-Only

- `flavors` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--flavors))

<a id="nestedatt--flavors"></a>

### Nested Schema for `flavors`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Flavor ID
- `name` (String) Flavor name
- `vcpus` (Number) Number of virtual CPUs
- `ram` (Number) RAM in MB
- `disk` (Number) Root disk size in GB
- `swap` (Number) Swap space in MB
- `ephemeral` (Number) Ephemeral disk size in GB
- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the flavor is publicly available
- `description` (String) Flavor description
